title: Triangleball
description: A deforming polygonal sphere of 5,120 triangles — anthracite PBR surface with environment reflections, wrapped in a neon-purple wireframe that blooms. Five deformation modes cross-fade continuously around a 55-second cycle: radial-big, radial-pulse, noise-breath, twist-spiral, axial-waves.
license_notes: Three.js 0.161 (MIT) via unpkg CDN, including postprocessing (UnrealBloomPass, OutputPass), environments (RoomEnvironment), and lines (LineSegments2, LineSegmentsGeometry, LineMaterial). No other runtime dependencies.
